## Testing checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `/` — home, scenario pick, **3-round** game completes
- [ ] `/speak` — category pick, sentence visible, **Try / demo / self** paths sanity-checked
- [ ] Browser: tested on **Chrome** (speak mode expectation)

## Breaking changes

<!-- List any behavior or copy changes that could surprise players or demos. None? Write "None." -->

## UI / UX review checklist

- [ ] Korean-first labels still readable
- [ ] Touch targets OK on narrow viewport (speak mode buttons)
- [ ] No new always-on motion without reduced-motion consideration (or justify in PR)
